subcodes.first_line: O seeker! The Wronged One hath turned toward thee from the precincts of the prison, and mentioneth thee purely for the sake of God, the Lord of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا طالب ان المظلوم توجه الیک من شطر السجن و یذکرک خالصا لوجه الله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proclamation to the people of the world, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @chastisement and requital
